Title: Establishes a supplemental motor vehicle registration fee for counties outside the Metropolitan Commuter Transportation District
Summary: Establishes a $25 annual supplemental motor vehicle registration fee for counties outside the Metropolitan Commuter Transportation District; dedicates the revenue to upstate public transportation systems.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to imposing a supplemental registration fee for counties outside of the metropolitan commuter transportation district
